description_long: This object is a stylized sunflower with a large, circular brown center surrounded by two layers of yellow-orange petals arranged in a radial pattern. The petals are broad, slightly pointed, and overlap each other, creating a full, symmetrical appearance. The flower is attached to a slender green stem, which supports three green leaves of varying sizes and shapes. The leaves are ovate with visible central veins and are positioned alternately along the stem. The overall design is simple and clean, with matte colors and minimal surface texture. This flower would commonly be found in urban parks, gardens, or decorative planters along sidewalks.
description: A stylized sunflower with a brown center, yellow-orange radial petals, and three green ovate leaves on a slender green stem.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the sunflower, with all petals and three green leaves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the flower, with petals and leaves aligned edge-on and less detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the back of the petals and the arrangement of the leaves along the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flower's thin profile and the alignment of petals and leaves.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with two visible layers, each petal slightly overlapping the next, creating a symmetrical and circular outline typical of sunflowers.
